subcodes.first_line: O Muhammad! God willing, mayest thou be enkindled even as a fire in the love of the All-Merciful, and be as water beneath the shade of His Lote-Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای محمد انشاء الله بمثابه نار در محبت رحمن مشتعل باشی و مانند ماء در ظل سدره اش
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @martyrs and martyrdom, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @wisdom [hikmat], @contention and conflict
